name: Dark Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the chocolate chips over low heat.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and salt to the melted chocolate.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped walnuts and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Spread the mixture evenly into a wax paper-lined 8 or 9-inch square pan.
5. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
6. Turn fudge onto a cutting board; peel off the paper.
7. Cut into squares.
8. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
